item.title: 22 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 304
item.description:
These firefighters spent the day fighting wildfires in Spain when they found a deer stranded in the forest
Read that one again
You can't think your way into a new way of acting, you have to act your way into a new way of thinking.
If you’re ever in a rut, drinking a glass of water is an easy step towards getting out of it. Cleaning your teeth and brushing your hair complete the small reset and enable you to take on the next small goal with a little momentum.
~Lanky-Stuff2785
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: Jeanine Pirro needs to be prosecuted for malicious prosecution. There is video of the paint floating on the water when he touched it, zero vandalism by the athlete occurred.
item.dc:creator: DrNicholasRivierA

item.title: Outrage.
item.description:
Republicans from across the country criticized Mayor Zohran Mamdani after he warned New Yorkers not to put too much pressure on the power grid during the brutal heat. The city is currently facing a multi-day forecast of extreme temperatures expected to continue through the holiday weekend. Here's what Mamdani said, and the Republican backlash that followed.
A large wave of Republicans responded after the post, with many saying that socialism was at fault for the request. "This is what socialism looks like, folks. The right answer isn’t restrictions or mandates. It’s drilling, fracking, coal, & nuclear," Vivek Ramaswamy, a Republican running for governor in Ohio, wrote on X. "That’s how we’ll roll in Ohio." "Welcome to socialism," Nikki Haley, a former candidate for president, tweeted. Ted Cruz, a senator in Texas, joked that "In a first-world country, you could turn on the A/C." A community note was added to the post that indicated Texas has also asked residents to turn their AC units to 78 degrees in the past.
item.dc:creator: sleeperkid

item.title: I Made A Sword That Swings Both Ways For Pride Month
item.description:
It took me all of June and I only got the video up at the end of June, but there you go: https://youtu.be/I8kWQICYO50
Made from: Hardox, a brick hammer, a Jackhammer chisel spike, some vintage rebar, a paper guillotine blade, a ball hitch, 6 different types of filler/welding rod including hard-facing and tool steel, using Stick, Mig and Tig welding.
Based on these guys, there are other pictures of weirdo weapons like this too from the time armor got good enough that fighting other people in armor called for some creative murder thinking.
item.dc:creator: michaelcthulhu

item.title: Flip the Script [OC]
item.description:
Bonus Panel below!!!
Get a book signed by ME! Fran doodle, custom greeting and bookmark at no extra cost! Just let me know the name/message you'd like when you order! https://litterboxcomics.shop/products/signed-parenting-is-weird-tails-from-the-litterbox-book
Still really proud of this BONUS panel! The idea came to me while watching my kids march around wearing Mickey Mouse's decapitated piñata head like a trophy of war.

26 Man Tax: Adrian Bouchet
What we call luck is often not purely random, but rather the delayed byproduct of consistently putting yourself in good positions." - James Clear So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: GovBrief Today #517
item.description: ICE agents took a nun's rosary and handcuffed her while she walked to Sunday Mass. Sister Letty Ugboaja is a 56-year-old nurse who has served South Texas for a decade. She spent the day in a detention cell until members of Congress from both parties called the Homeland Security secretary to demand her release. Her arrest came in the middle of a surge nobody announced. ICE has detained more than 10,000 people in five days, doubling its pace to 2,000 a day because the White House demanded bigger numbers. The surge was working until agents grabbed a woman half the Rio Grande Valley seemingly knows by name, one block from her church. Her parish posted the news, and the anger tore through the Valley faster than the government could contain it. They let her go before dark, hoping that would end it. But her story is still spreading. I've emailed 8,057 stories over 517 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260701-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july1 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-hearings [3] https://go.govbrief.today/radiation-recommendation [4] https://go.govbrief.today/usmca-review [5] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-medal-honor [6] https://go.govbrief.today/chicago-grand-juries [7] https://go.govbrief.today/va-ca-guns [8] https://go.govbrief.today/va-masks-blocked [9] https://go.govbrief.today/brennan-sues [10] https://go.govbrief.today/tx-sentencing [11] https://go.govbrief.today/mn-not-guilty-pleas [12] https://go.govbrief.today/prisons-closing [13] https://go.govbrief.today/texas-nun [14] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-10k [15] https://go.govbrief.today/ed-grants-suit [16] https://go.govbrief.today/co-clemency-fired [17] https://go.govbrief.today/nyc-vertiports [18] https://go.govbrief.today/af1-qatar [19] https://go.govbrief.today/ca-sellby [20] https://go.govbrief.today/nj-healthcare Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Meme Dump
item.dc:creator: youtinybrainedwipersofotherpeoplesbottoms

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1735 (titboots)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
It's my birthday today... aaaand I am at the bottom of the board for jeep tours and the forest north of Sedona is on fire, so I'm probably not going to get any tours but have to be close by-ish just in case. Hooray. While there's a wildfire on so nobody is booking tours.
42 years old today. I had honestly hoped to be dead by now when I was 17 years old.
There's only one thing I really want for today and I know it's not going to happen today, so it goes.
Maybe I'll go and do some birding on the other side of the mountain anyway this morning. I woke up in a sour helpless mood after the dreams I had, though they weren't inherently bad at all. I mean, the headache from the wildfire smoke doesn't help the mood either.
I have two bottles, waiting. But I have a feeling the fucker is possessed by a demon and won't ever die, and when he does they'll have an AI substitute for him.
Step one to become a fossil: die.
I do not want to think, i've seen people who live that way and it seems peaceful.
Unpopular Arizonan Opinion: all heat is valid and the reason for the rise in temperature lies in the hands of people with detachable heads. Go get 'em, sport.
Titboots.
If that solidarity is a creosote bush, it's a start. Speaking from personal experience.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Glory Pippin! I love you." __ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Punish them
item.description: So far the bulk of the comments here are either "you're not asking themselves to punch themselves hard enough" or "kids wouldn't just go to their room if you told them to." Democrats. Always talking about being on a spectrum but unable to understand there are more views on the spectrum than your immediate perspective.
